assets.summary: Lizzie Bennet documents Ep 1 on camera as Jane Bennet and Lydia Bennet pull her into family drama. Mrs. Bennet amplifies tension at dinner before Lizzie Bennet and Jane Bennet reconcile the sisters on vlog.

cast_analysis.name: Lizzie Bennet
cast_analysis.description: Documents her life on camera in Ep 1; narrates emotional beats directly to viewers.

cast_analysis.name: Jane Bennet
cast_analysis.description: Voice of reason; mediates family conflict with quiet empathy.

cast_analysis.name: Lydia Bennet
cast_analysis.description: Impulsive; escalates drama through social media posts.

cast_analysis.name: Mrs. Bennet
cast_analysis.description: Pushes marriage and status; creates awkward dinner tension.

episode_timeline.label: Vlog hook
episode_timeline.action_description: Lizzie opens with a breezy recap, then admits something felt off after last night's party.

episode_timeline.label: Sister check-in
episode_timeline.action_description: Jane visits Lizzie's room; they decode a cryptic text from a love interest.

episode_timeline.label: Lydia's post
episode_timeline.action_description: Lydia's viral post misquotes Lizzie; Lizzie confronts her on camera.

episode_timeline.label: Family dinner
episode_timeline.action_description: Mrs. Bennet steers conversation to marriage; Lizzie pushes back while Jane tries to change the subject.

episode_timeline.label: Confession cam
episode_timeline.action_description: Alone, Lizzie tells viewers she fears being misread by both family and audience.

episode_timeline.label: Romantic DM
episode_timeline.action_description: Jane reads a heartfelt message aloud; Lizzie debates whether to reply on or off vlog.

episode_timeline.label: Public misunderstanding
episode_timeline.action_description: Commenters twist Lizzie's words; Lydia fans the flames instead of defending her sister.

episode_timeline.label: Sister reconciliation
episode_timeline.action_description: Jane brokers a truce; Lydia apologizes on camera with uncharacteristic sincerity.

episode_timeline.label: Episode button
episode_timeline.action_description: Lizzie closes the vlog teasing next week's reveal while texting the love interest.

most_important_scene.title: Romantic DM
most_important_scene.reasoning: Editorially, "Romantic DM" is the pivot of Ep 1: Lizzie Bennet and Jane Bennet drive the hope → uncertainty arc. Jane reads a heartfelt message aloud; Lizzie debates whether to reply on or off vlog. This beat best represents the episode for clips, discovery, and programming because it names the characters viewers follow.
